---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement, new capability, or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
Describe the feature in 1 to 3 sentences.

## Problem to Solve
Explain the user need, pain point, or gap this feature addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you considered if applicable.

## Additional Context
Add examples, mockups, or anything else that helps explain the request.
